# InfraCost

> Infrastructure cost tracking dashboard for cloud and AI platforms

InfraCost is a self-hosted web application that tracks and optimizes infrastructure spending across 12 cloud and AI platforms. It provides automated cost collection, budget alerts, anomaly detection, drift detection, domain/SSL expiry tracking, and project analytics — all in a single dashboard.

## Key Features

- **12-Platform Tracking**: API collectors for Render, Railway, Anthropic, Claude Max, Neon, Turso, Resend, UptimeRobot, GCP, GitHub, Google Services, Websupport
- **Budget & Anomaly Alerts**: Threshold alerts (50-100%) + anomaly detection for spending spikes. Email and WhatsApp notifications.
- **Countdown Dashboard**: Credits, plan limits, domain renewals, SSL expirations, and free tier deadlines — urgency-sorted with risk badges
- **Drift Detection**: Compares live API service inventories against tracked records daily. Auto-discovers untracked GitHub repos.
- **Project Analytics**: GA4 traffic + Google Search Console performance per project with SEO scoring
- **Expiry Tracking**: 21 domain/hosting/SSL renewals tracked with countdown timers
- **Weekly Digest**: Automated Monday email with MTD spend, budget %, active alerts, manual reminders
- **Autonomous Health Checks**: Weekly scheduled agent audits project registry against GitHub repos
- **Dual Currency**: All amounts shown in both USD and EUR

## Tech Stack

- Nuxt 4 (Vue 3) + Nuxt UI v4 + Tailwind CSS v4
- Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL (Railway)
- Google OAuth for authentication
- Daily cron collection at 06:00 UTC
- 183 tests across 15 files

## Pages

- `/` — Landing page + authenticated dashboard overview
- `/breakdown` — Per-service cost breakdown (by platform or by project)
- `/trends` — Monthly cost trends with MoM comparison
- `/optimizations` — Cost optimization suggestions
- `/countdown` — Credits + limits + domain/SSL expiry countdown
- `/alerts` — Filterable alert history with bulk actions
- `/analytics` — GA4 traffic + GSC search performance per project
- `/status` — UptimeRobot monitors + project registry + drift detection
- `/platforms` — Platform cards with API status, freshness, account info
- `/budgets` — Budget management and threshold configuration
- `/manual` — Manual cost entry for non-API platforms

## URL

https://infracost.eu

## Source

https://github.com/peter-fusek/infracost
